ddls:
CREATE TABLE "hurricanes" (
  "hurricane_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hurricane */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the hurricane occurred */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month the hurricane occurred */,
  "states_affected" TEXT /* States affected by the hurricane and their respective categories */,
  "saffir_simpson_category" INTEGER /* Saffir-Simpson category of the hurricane */,
  "central_pressure" INTEGER /* Central pressure in millibars */,
  "max_wind" INTEGER /* Maximum wind speed in knots */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the hurricane */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the hurricane was first detected */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the hurricane dissipated */,
  "track_status" TEXT /* Current status of the hurricane (e.g., active, dissipated) */,
  "storm_tide" REAL /* Maximum storm tide level */,
  "rainfall" REAL /* Maximum rainfall recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hurricane_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hurricanes_saffir_simpson_category FOREIGN KEY ("saffir_simpson_category") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hurricanes_states_affected FOREIGN KEY ("states_affected") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Current population of the state */,
  "area" REAL /* Land area of the state */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hurricane category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the hurricane category (e.g., Category 1, Category 2) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category's effects */,
  "storm_surge" REAL /* Expected storm surge for the category */,
  "rainfall_range" TEXT /* Expected rainfall range for the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wind_speed_ranges" (
  "range_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wind speed range */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hurricane category */,
  "min_speed" INTEGER /* Minimum wind speed for the category */,
  "max_speed" INTEGER /* Maximum wind speed for the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("range_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pressure_ranges" (
  "pressure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pressure range */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hurricane category */,
  "min_pressure" INTEGER /* Minimum central pressure for the category */,
  "max_pressure" INTEGER /* Maximum central pressure for the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pressure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "hurricane_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hurricane corresponding to this record */,
  "total_loss" REAL /* Total estimated loss in dollars due to the hurricane */,
  "total_injuries" INTEGER /* Total number of injuries reported during the hurricane */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the data was recorded */,
  "total_deaths" INTEGER /* Total number of deaths reported due to the hurricane */,
  "total_homeless" INTEGER /* Total number of people left homeless */,
  "total_displaced" INTEGER /* Total number of people displaced */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_hurricane_id FOREIGN KEY ("hurricane_id") REFERENCES hurricanes ("hurricane_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for logging into the system */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, researcher, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "hurricane_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hurricane being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_hurricane_id FOREIGN KEY ("hurricane_id") REFERENCES hurricanes ("hurricane_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hurricane_tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tracking entry */,
  "hurricane_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hurricane being tracked */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the hurricane at the recorded time */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the hurricane at the recorded time */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the tracking data */,
  "speed" REAL /* Speed of the hurricane at the recorded time */,
  "direction" TEXT /* Direction of the hurricane at the recorded time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hurricane_tracks_hurricane_id FOREIGN KEY ("hurricane_id") REFERENCES hurricanes ("hurricane_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "hurricane_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hurricane for which the alert was issued */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., warning, advisory) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message associated with the alert */,
  "issued_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was issued */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "affected_areas" TEXT /* Specific areas affected by the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_hurricane_id FOREIGN KEY ("hurricane_id") REFERENCES hurricanes ("hurricane_id")
)
